Hi, this is Percival. I want to give you a quick recap of last week, because it was a busy one. On Monday I attended the risk meeting in the morning. After that, I reviewed the audit, and I found two small problems with the controls. So on Tuesday I prepared a short summary with the main findings. On Wednesday the team submitted the report, and the director approved it the same day. Then on Thursday I traveled to Miami for the conference. The trip was long, but the sessions were very useful. Finally, on Friday I came back to the office and shared the outcome with my team. In short, it was a hard week, but a good one.

Hi Percival, this is Karen with a short update from the team. Yesterday we finished the work on the new control. First, we checked the previous report from last quarter. Then we collected all the evidence, and we wrote a clear summary. The whole process took about three hours, but the outcome was good. This morning I sent the document to the director, and she approved it without changes. So everything is ready for your call this afternoon. Have a great day, and talk soon.

First, Percival attended the risk meeting on Monday. Then he reviewed the audit and found two problems. After that, he prepared a short summary. Later, the team submitted the report to the director. Finally, the director approved the report the same day.
